headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 26, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox secured a 5-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Connelly Early earning the win. Aroldis Chapman earned the save, striking out two batters in a scoreless inning. The Atlanta Braves took down the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2, led by Matt Olson's home run and 3 RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays defeated the Cleveland Guardians 4-2, with Jesús Sánchez hitting a home run and driving in 3 runs.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. Tanner Murray has been placed on the 10-day injured list by the Chicago White Sox due to a left shoulder dislocation. Max Scherzer has been placed on the 15-day injured list by the Toronto Blue Jays with right forearm tendinitis and left ankle inflammation. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the Los Angeles Angels, Chicago Cubs, Detroit Tigers, Cleveland Guardians, New York Yankees, and Cincinnati Reds.

The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in exchange for cash. The Blue Jays also made a trade with the Seattle Mariners, acquiring RHP Ty Cummings. Other notable trades include the Colorado Rockies trading 3B Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash, and the Houston Astros trading RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Take Down Orioles 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 5-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Connelly Early earning the win. Aroldis Chapman earned the save, striking out two batters in a scoreless inning.

top_news.title: **Braves Take Down Phillies in 6-2 Thriller**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves secured a 6-2 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Chris Sale earning the win after 6.0 innings of scoreless relief. Matt Olson led the Braves' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 2-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Jesús Sánchez leading the offense with a home run and 3 RBIs. Colin Holderman impressed on the mound with 1.1 scoreless innings, striking out 2 batters.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Reds in Dominant 8-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing win over the Cincinnati Reds, outscoring them 8-3. Gleyber Torres led the Tigers' offense with a strong performance, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 2 runs.

top_news.title: **White Sox Place Tanner Murray on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago White Sox left fielder Tanner Murray has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in exchange for cash. MacIver joins the Blue Jays' lineup, bringing his skills to the team.
